top3.sql:
SELECT p.ID, p.Birthday, e.Diagnosis
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE l.RBC < (SELECT AVG(RBC) FROM Laboratory);

SELECT p.ID, p.Birthday, e.Diagnosis
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE l.RBC < 4.0;

final.sql:
SELECT p.ID, p.Birthday, e.Diagnosis
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE l.RBC < (SELECT AVG(RBC) FROM Laboratory);
